parsing_approach: Real XML parse via xml.sax with a locator for line numbers. Handles comments, CDATA, entities, and attribute quoting correctly by construction. External entity and DTD resolution disabled. Element ids are stable sibling-indexed paths (/root[1]/child[2]).
extracts: every element with sibling-indexed xpath id, start/end line span
attributes and trimmed text content (capped at 500 chars)
known_limitations: Generic: emits raw XML structure only; interpreting web.xml/struts-config semantics is the graph builders' job.
SAX locator lines point at the end of the start tag; multi-line start tags report the closing line.
Not for JSP (not well-formed XML) — use jsp-structure instead.
Files with undeclared entities fail to parse (reported as an error, never half-parsed).
